action.reasoning: Observation: TorchMD-Net model imports (PaiNN, TensorNet, ET) fail with 'cannot import name', indicating the installed torchmdnet may have different class names or older version. Mordred too slow for full dataset. Current best MAE 0.163 from fingerprints, but 3D coordinates could yield much better results. Analysis: e3nn (pre-installed) may not depend on torch_scatter and could enable 3D models without segfault. Need to check torchmdnet.models actual exports and test e3nn basic functionality. Decision: Run diagnostic script to list torchmdnet.models contents and test e3nn import/network creation.
